network.cloudflare_blocked: Cloudflare protection blocked access to {{service}}. Suggestions: 1) Use VPN 2) Switch network 3) Retry later 4) Switch to other AI services
network.connection_refused: Connection refused, please check if Codex service is running properly.
network.unknown_error: Network connection error, please check network settings.
network.quick_switch_content:
When current service encounters network restrictions, you can:

1. **Switch AI Assistant Immediately**: Select other available assistants from the left panel
2. **Check Service Status**: Availability of different AI services may vary by region
3. **Network Optimization**: Use stable network environment to improve connection success rate
4. **Retry Later**: Network restrictions are usually temporary

**Tip**: It's recommended to configure multiple AI services as alternatives to ensure work continuity.

cloudflare_blocked: • Switch to other available services: ChatGPT, Claude, Qwen, Gemini
network_timeout: • Check if network connection is stable
• Switch to more stable network environment
connection_refused: • Check if Codex CLI is properly installed
• Verify service configuration and API keys
• Check if local ports are occupied

thinking.analyzing: Analyzing the problem and formulating solutions...

error.context_error: Error occurred in {{context}}, please refresh or retry.
error.generic: Codex component encountered an exception, please try again later.
error.suggestion_1: Check if network connection is stable
error.suggestion_2: Ensure Codex service is running properly
error.suggestion_4: Clear browser cache and local storage

performance.virtualization_enabled: List virtualization is enabled for better performance
performance.virtualization_disabled: List virtualization is disabled, showing all items

permissions.allow_once_desc: Grant permission for this request only
permissions.allow_always_desc: Always grant permission for similar requests

descriptions.command_execution: Codex requests to execute system commands
descriptions.file_write: Codex requests to modify or create files
descriptions.file_read: Codex requests to read file contents

command_execution.allow_always_desc: Always allow all command execution requests
command_execution.reject_always_desc: Always reject all command execution requests

file_write.allow_always_desc: Always allow all file write requests
file_write.reject_always_desc: Always reject all file write requests

file_read.allow_always_desc: Always allow all file read requests
file_read.reject_always_desc: Always reject all file read requests
